title: Toona
description: A LabPBR compliant Toon style resource pack.
body:
Gumroad: [https://aniwxld.gumroad.com/l/toona](https://aniwxld.gumroad.com/l/toona)
Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/aniwxld

What is Toona?
A fully LabPBR compliant texture pack, which aims to follow the Toon style and completely overhaul the vanilla Minecraft experience.

What are the core features?
Toona is a fully LabPBR compliant resource pack that is also compatible with both Iris and Optifine.

What are the Requirements and Compatibility?
Toona is compatible from Minecraft version 1.16 and beyond.

Optifine or Iris mod are the main requirements for Toona and a LabPBR compliant shader is highly recommended.

Toona 256/512x is available through Patreon or Gumroad.

How do I install and make my game look like in the screenshots above?
In order to achieve the same results as shown in the screenshots, please follow this installation guide.

If you still have any questions, please join my Discord server and in #support server kindly ping @staff role, and we'll help you out as soon as we can!
